title: taraxacum aereum
intro: Taraxacum aereum, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum aereum include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which make it a popular herb for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum aereum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and skin conditions. Taraxacum aereum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw leaf or root addition to salads and soups.
